prompt: Create a warm cinematic vertical illustration of a young female artist sitting in a cozy, plant-filled painting studio on a rainy day, surrounded by exactly three black cats. The artist is shown in three-quarter profile from behind/side, seated on the floor beside a wooden easel, with a large messy high bun of chestnut brown hair, wearing a loose dark charcoal long-sleeve blouse and a cream skirt or loose cream trousers. Her face is intentionally obscured by a simple centered square block of flat medium brown color, covering the facial features while leaving the hair, neck, hand, and pose visible. She holds a thin paintbrush near her mouth with one hand, while the cat on the easel reaches up and touches or bats at the brush with one paw. Include exactly three black cats: one in the lower left foreground looking up with large golden eyes, one on the left midground leaping or stretching near a doorway with tail raised and bright yellow eyes, and one on the right perched on the easel ledge, gazing at the brush with one raised paw. The studio is lush and atmospheric, with many potted green plants around a tall sunlit window, a wooden table with pots and flowers, white daisies blooming near the left side, an angled canvas on the easel at the right, jars and cups of paintbrushes in the bottom right foreground, and scattered warm painterly details. Use rainy-day golden window light with soft backlighting, glowing dust motes, wet reflective ambience, and a nostalgic quiet mood. Style should be detailed anime-inspired painterly realism, rich texture, dramatic golden-hour lighting, deep shadows, warm amber highlights, expressive cats, high detail, vertical 3:4 composition, no visible text, no watermark.
